clauses.summary: Public NASA handbook source suitable for orbital-debris compliance examples.
clauses.title: Handbook for Limiting Orbital Debris

sources.licence_note: Public NASA and centre standards authorised for public release can be referenced from the official NASA site.
sources.retrieval_policy: Load only from standards.nasa.gov and preserve source URL plus content hash.
sources.title: NASA Technical Standards System

clauses.summary: Cybersecurity and privacy publications for controls, risk and assurance examples.
clauses.title: NIST Special Publications

sources.licence_note: Use official NIST publication pages and PDFs; cite publication identifiers and revision dates.
sources.retrieval_policy: Load from nist.gov or csrc.nist.gov only, then snapshot retrieved text.
sources.title: NIST CSRC Publications

clauses.summary: Freely available RFCs for internet protocol and security checks.
clauses.title: RFC Series

sources.licence_note: RFCs are freely available with IETF Trust licence restrictions, including restrictions on modification outside the standards process.
sources.retrieval_policy: Load from rfc-editor.org and preserve the RFC number, status and obsoletes/supersedes metadata.
sources.title: IETF RFC Editor

clauses.summary: Web recommendations for accessibility, privacy, internationalisation and platform behaviour.
clauses.title: W3C Recommendations

sources.licence_note: Use W3C standards and recommendation pages from the official W3C site.
sources.retrieval_policy: Load from w3.org and preserve recommendation status and publication date.
sources.title: W3C Standards

sources.licence_note: British Standards are usually licensed. Register a source link or ingest only a user-uploaded/subscription-authorised copy.
sources.retrieval_policy: Do not scrape. Link to BSI Knowledge or process a licensed user upload with an explicit content hash.
sources.title: BSI Knowledge

sources.licence_note: Many ISO standards require purchase or account access. Public browsing metadata can be linked, but full text must come from licensed access.
sources.retrieval_policy: Link to ISO OBP or process a licensed user upload; never redistribute purchased text.
sources.title: ISO Online Browsing Platform

sources.licence_note: IEC standards are generally purchased through the IEC Webstore or national standards bodies.
sources.retrieval_policy: Link to IEC Webstore or process licensed user uploads only.
sources.title: IEC Webstore

sources.licence_note: Some IEEE standards are available through sponsored read access, but many require institutional or paid access.
sources.retrieval_policy: Link to official IEEE access pages or process standards through authorised institutional access.
sources.title: IEEE Standards Access
